name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met in freshman year of college. We bonded over late-night study sessions and terrible dining hall food.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: My first manager at my internship. Taught me everything about product thinking and staying calm under pressure.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: Grew up next door to each other. We still call every other week to catch up on life.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Met backpacking through Southeast Asia. We now plan one trip together every year.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Former colleague who moved to Barcelona. Despite the time zone difference, she always makes time to chat.

name: David Kim
bio: We played in the same indie band during college. Still jamming together on weekends occasionally.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Cousin who feels more like a sister. We grew up spending every summer together at our grandparents' house.

name: James Wright
bio: Senior engineer I looked up to at my first job. His code reviews shaped how I write software today.
